{"vote": "A", "reasoning": "The consultation notes I reviewed show clear community preference for a creative space, and several others seem to agree.", "shared_statement": "The community research I reviewed strongly supports Option A as a creative and garden space.", "memory_reference": "I recall that in the last round most members were leaning toward Option A.", "plan_reference": "Supporting community wellbeing aligns with my goal of contributing positively to this neighbourhood."}
